generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance GantryCartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval controller for horizontal cart movement of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval controller for vertical hoisting movement of the crane via stepper motor"
]

instance ElectromagneticPickup : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Mechanically picks up and releases small pucks (containers) at the crane's end effector"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures angular position of the hoist swing to detect motion deviations"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleMeasurementData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed to influence crane stability and trajectory planning"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedMeasurementData
]

instance ArduinoMeasurementSystem : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino-based system collecting data from swing angle encoder and anemometer, interfacing with crane controllers via custom KiCad shield"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CombinedSensorData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction - Data Transmission
instance SwingAngleMeasurementData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedMeasurementData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance ControllerFeedbackSignals : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GantryCartMotorController, HoistMotorController
]

instance HmiOperationalLogs : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumanMachineInterface
]

instance CombinedSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoMeasurementSystem
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance Fusion360CraneFrameModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 CAD model of the gantry crane frame for geometric representation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance KinematicTrajectoryModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used by Trajectory Generator Service to compute optimal movement paths"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance PhysicsBasedSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics-based simulation of crane dynamics including motor controllers and sensor feedback"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]

instance HistoricalTrajectoryLogs : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of motor position/velocity, swing angle measurements, wind speed, and trajectory execution logs"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleMeasurementData, WindSpeedMeasurementData, ControllerFeedbackSignals, HmiOperationalLogs
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance RealTimeTrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Current trajectory execution parameters and sensor feedback for real-time validation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleMeasurementData, WindSpeedMeasurementData, ControllerFeedbackSignals
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorService, ContinuousValidationService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PythonGantryLib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for core services (gantrylib) implementing crane control logic and trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PostgreSQL-based time-series database storing historical data (motor position/velocity, swing angles, wind speed, trajectory logs)"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalTrajectoryLogs
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool displaying real-time and simulated trajectory traces with confidence bounds"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker facilitating service-to-service communication between containerized services"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, ContinuousValidationService, DashboardService
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerized deployment infrastructure (docker-compose.yml) managing TimescaleDB, MQTT broker, and Dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables TimescaleDB, EclipseMosquittoBroker, GrafanaDashboard
]

// C6: Services
instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computes optimal movement paths minimizing residual swinging motion using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight, TrajectoryExecutionAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares executed trajectories with simulations, enforcing safety thresholds via distance metrics"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyValidationInsight, FaultDetectionAction
]

instance HistoricalDataAnalyzer : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Processes time-series data for historical analysis and model tuning"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelParameterInsight
]

instance DashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time visualization of crane operations and system status"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalStatusInsight
]

instance TrajectoryVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Displays real-time and simulated trajectory traces with confidence bounds in Grafana"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryVisualizationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides optimal paths that minimize residual swinging motion, improving operational efficiency"
]

instance SafetyValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts operators to deviations (motor misalignment, sensor errors) via continuous validation"
]

instance ModelParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Enables tuning of kinematic models or sensor calibration using historical data analysis"
]

instance OperationalStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Displays real-time operational parameters (trajectory configurations, logger settings) for monitoring"
]

instance TrajectoryVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Shows real-time and simulated trajectory traces with confidence bounds for validation"
]

instance FaultDetectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically triggers alerts and corrective actions for detected faults in crane operation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TrajectoryExecutionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Executes optimized trajectories based on real-time sensor feedback and model predictions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ModelParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Updates kinematic models or sensor calibration parameters based on historical performance data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C12: Physical System Components
instance PhysicalGantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by harbor cranes in Antwerp port, including frame, dual motors, controllers, electromagnet, and anemometer"
    base:contains GantryCartMotorController, HoistMotorController, ElectromagneticPickup, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoMeasurementSystem
]

instance HumanMachineInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Interface for logging operational parameters (trajectory configurations, logger settings) for database persistence"
    base:contains HmiOperationalLogs
]

// C13: Digital Twin Environment
instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalGantryCraneSystem, TimescaleDB, EclipseMosquittoBroker, GrafanaDashboard,
        TrajectoryGeneratorService, ContinuousValidationService, HistoricalDataAnalyzer, DashboardService, TrajectoryVisualizationService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital twin interacts with the physical system through:
  - **Trajectory Generation Service**: Sends optimized movement trajectories (kinematic model-based) to the **Control Application** (Python), which translates them into control commands for the crane’s motors via the **Physical Crane Interface**.
  - **Continuous Validation Service**: Compares real-time sensor data with simulated trajectories to detect deviations; alerts operators via the **Dashboard** if thresholds are exceeded, triggering manual intervention."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning operates on a **real-time to near-real-time** scale:
  - **Data logging frequency**: Continuous (sensor data captured at the rate of physical system operation, typically aligned with motor control cycles).
  - **Trajectory generation latency**: Near-instantaneous (kinematic model computations executed in real-time during operation).
  - **Continuous validation**: Operates in **real-time**, comparing live sensor data with simulated trajectories with minimal delay (~0 ms to <100 ms, depending on system load)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation is orchestrated as follows:
  - **Centralized Orchestration**: All services (Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation) are logically centralized within the **gantrylib** Python module but deployed in **decentralized containers** (Docker) for scalability.
  - **Service Interactions**:
    - **Trajectory Generator** → **Control Application** (via Physical Crane Interface).
    - **Continuous Validation** ← **Logging Application** (sensor data) and → **Dashboard** (alerts).
    - **Simulation Service** provides reference trajectories for validation.
  - **Data Flow**: MQTT broker mediates communication between services, ensuring real-time synchronization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates across the following lifecycle stages of the physical system:
  - **As Designed**: Kinematic models and CAD representations (Autodesk Fusion360) define ideal crane behavior.
  - **As Manufactured**: Physical crane components (motors, controllers, Arduino) are calibrated and interfaced via the **Physical Crane Interface**.
  - **As Operated**: Real-time data logging, trajectory optimization, and continuous validation ensure operational fidelity during use."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Model Validation**:
    - **Kinematic Model**: Aligned with physical crane geometry (CAD models) to minimize trajectory errors.
    - **Simulation Service**: Physics-based model validates real-time sensor data against expected dynamics.
  - **Continuous Validation**:
    - **Distance Metrics**: Compares executed trajectories with simulated paths, enforcing thresholds to detect deviations.
    - **Uncertainty Handling**: Wind speed data (from anemometer) is incorporated into trajectory planning to account for environmental noise.
  - **Verification/Validation Mechanisms**:
    - **Dashboard Traces**: Visual comparison of real vs. simulated trajectories (Fig. 8) to assess alignment."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections between the physical twin and digital twin include:
  - **Network Protocols**:
    - **MQTT** for service-to-service communication (Eclipse Mosquitto broker).
    - **HTTP/REST** for HMI interactions (Python-based control interface).
  - **Data Transmission**:
    - Sensor data (swing angle, wind speed) streamed via **Arduino** → **Physical Crane Interface** (Python) → **Logging Application** → **TimescaleDB**.
    - Trajectory commands flow from **Trajectory Generator** → **Control Application** → **Physical Crane Interface** → Crane motors."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is hosted and deployed on:
  - **Single-Personal-Computer Deployment**: All services (Python containers, DB, MQTT broker, Dashboard) run on a single machine via Docker.
  - **Docker Compose**: Automated setup/teardown with a single command (`docker-compose up`/`down`).
  - **First-Time Setup**: Initialization scripts handle database and dashboard configuration automatically."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration with external systems is **not explicitly documented** in the provided documents. The exemplar focuses solely on the internal twinning loop between the physical gantry crane and its digital counterpart."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership is **not explicitly defined** in the documents. The digital twin logs operational data (sensor readings, trajectories) to **TimescaleDB**, which is managed by the research team. Privacy considerations are not addressed beyond ensuring data is stored locally on the researcher’s machine."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The exemplar follows **ad-hoc standardization**:
  - **No Industry-Specific Frameworks**: Uses open-source tools (Python, Docker, TimescaleDB, Grafana) without adherence to digital twin standards like **Eclipse Ditto** or **Eclipse BaSyx**.
  - **Modeling Standards**:
    - **CAD**: Autodesk Fusion360 (industry standard for mechanical design).
    - **System Engineering**: Capella models (used for teaching extensions, though not standardized for digital twins)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed as follows:
  - **Remote Operation**: The digital twin can execute commands remotely on the physical crane, but **human-in-the-loop** validation is enforced via the **Continuous Validation Service** (threshold-based alerts).
  - **Safety Mechanisms**:
    - **Trajectory Validation**: Ensures no residual swinging motion at end of movement.
    - **Fault Detection**: Time-series classification (publication [6]) identifies anomalies (e.g., motor faults) to prevent accidents.
  - **No Explicit Security Protocols**: Data transmission is not encrypted (MQTT over plaintext), and access to the HMI is not secured beyond basic Python-based controls."
]
